summary: Implemented the remaining high-confidence residual event-family scout slice with exact payload/source-context gates, reducing event_family other from 157 to 143 while keeping validate clean.

details: Added exact event-kind plus payload/source-context gates for the fourteen remaining safe scout candidates.

Kept generic protest, budget deal, labor settlement, presidential visit, personnel/employment/hiring, inception, price adjustment, operation, seasonal preparation, safety program, awareness day, and awareness week records as other unless the decisive source proof is present.
The two prior scout incident records, Hurricane Ida and Winter Storm Fern, were already resolved by the preceding source-block context slice and were not duplicated here.

parallel_audit.recommended_next_rule: Add a derived non-actionable taxonomy/scope flag for treatment_kind=route_type route taxonomy records without rewriting raw treatment_kind.

remaining_lanes: Treatment noisy/actionable union: 37 records, starting with 10 route_type taxonomy records.
One route identity/key candidate remains: route_far-rockaway-branch-127546 -> route_lirr-far-rockaway-branch-2023.
blocks_fts remains schema-only until full-corpus trigram index population is safe on the local SQLite stack.
